Favorites genres: Action, Comedy, Drama, Romance, Fantasy, Adventure

div.div:
One day, a gate suddenly opened in the heavens, bringing with it the invasion of monsters and the intervention of monks in the human world.
『Miracle Drug “Coffee” Administration』
『Medicinal Contents: Caffeine and Sugar』 ☞ Provides energy ☞ Stimulates the central nervous system ☞ Maximizes senses and reflexes
The whole world appeared to slow down, and Han-Yul’s medications began to show its true effects.

Emperor Aurelian Agnes, founder of an empire and master of abyssal magic, one day falls asleep atop a book that portends his empire’s end. Waking up as a weak and sequestered prince in that future timeline, he must use his knowledge of the book and his unique magic to break the mold set before him and change the world’s impending end. Can he overcome an invading demon army, infighting royals, magical disasters, and even his own weak body, or will his empire fall for good? (Source: Tapas)
